Variables.Name: FilePath
Variables.Description:
The path to the media file to be played.
	 
	  @see SetFilePath

Variables.Name: PrecacheFile
Variables.Description: Load entire media file into memory and play from there (if possible).

Functions.Name: SetFilePath
Functions.Description:
Set the path to the media file that this source represents.
	 
	  Automatically converts full paths to media sources that reside in the
	  Engine's or project's ContentMovies directory into relative paths.
